description: Versioned request and execution envelope for workflow dispatchers and future UI callers.

properties.requestId: optional caller-generated identifier without machine-specific data
properties.includeOutput: boolean; opt-in because child output may contain local data

reliabilityExtension.notes: Callers that request retries, cancellation, resumability, or parent/child execution must satisfy the separate fail-closed reliability contract.

privacy.notes: Request arguments and optional child output may contain local paths, endpoints, or other private values. Callers must keep them local and sanitize evidence before committing it.
